levels.label: WATCH
levels.meaning: Early movement worth watching; no immediate intervention.

levels.label: MONITOR
levels.meaning: Mild pressure or uncertainty; keep regular monitoring cadence.

levels.label: ELEVATED
levels.meaning: Meaningful pressure increase; review allocation and sequencing.

levels.label: HIGH
levels.meaning: High stress regime; enact predefined mitigations.

levels.label: CRITICAL
levels.meaning: Systemic stress; execute freeze-risk or contingency playbook.
